sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72070" key="o)dontoce/sths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀδοντο-ξέστης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n72070.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">instrument for cleaning the teeth,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:96" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.96</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
